name: PowerShell LSP
description: PowerShell language server using PowerShell Editor Services

args: Import-Module PowerShellEditorServices; Start-EditorServices -HostName 'Claude Code' -HostProfileId 'claude' -HostVersion '1.0.0' -LogPath '/dev/null' -SessionDetailsPath '/dev/null' -FeatureFlags @() -AdditionalModules @() -BundledModulesPath (Split-Path -Parent (Get-Module PowerShellEditorServices -ListAvailable | Select-Object -First 1).Path) -EnableConsoleRepl -Stdio
